intro: The pinnacle of current-generation graphics, a game changer in modern warfare
description:
The ultimate weapon that will bring the world to ruin, the NEMESIS Protocol. There is only a minute left before it starts operating. Now, the best special forces are moving to eliminate high-level targets that threaten the world.

A meeting of the overwhelming live-action graphics created by next-generation engines and the near-future high-tech tactics. Experience the pinnacle of the most innovative and realistic modern warfare at Battle Strike.

· A battlefield without limits, complete freedom: an unpredictable battle in a vast open field. There is no established route. Only your strategic choice becomes a tactic.
· Strongest Maneuvering Equipment on the Ground: Directly steer the next generation of tanks to devastate enemy strongholds and cover our allies. Maneuvering equipment allows you to dominate battlefields at high speeds and preoccupy key bases.
· Four identities for perfect victory: Synergy with four individual bottles of Assault, Engineer, Support, and Recon, and essential collaborative action for victory.
· Thrill-Flowing Tactical Match: Deathmatch's Survival Instinct, Break down enemy lines of defense with overwhelming tactical play in Conquest and Rush modes.
· Into the Extreme Battlefield: From a desert base swirling with chaos to a huge secret factory dominated by iron and high heat, prove your agent's prowess in breathtaking tension.

<Synopsis: The Great Shadow, and the Countdown>
In an era where national borders have collapsed, the world falls into the clutches of the invisible ruler, the 'Black Octave'. This private military and tech cartel manipulates global conflicts from behind the scenes and is dismantling the existing world order by trading in forbidden, cutting-edge weapons. On the day of humanity's final judgment, which they have kept hidden, the ultimate weapon, the 'NEMESIS Protocol', begins to activate.

You are an elite agent of the world's most elite special forces unit who must eliminate the leader of this invisible, massive evil. Track down the leader lurking in the shadows and stop the countdown that will drive the world to destruction.

The operation has already begun. Be deployed on an extreme mission unfolding on the edge of hell, alongside your most trusted comrade.
